_readme: SAMPLE — precomputed navigator answers (question → dashboard spec). Regenerate for your own corpus.

spec.narration: The tools that made it out the door and are in use.
The ones that were shelved — and what they taught.
The playful corner: rhythm, sprites, and sound.
A generalist maker of small, delightful tools — building in public, one month at a time.
The materials returned to most: typescript, sound, and shipping.
